name: fix-bug
description: バグ修正統合スキル（原因調査→修正→テスト→レビュー→QA→PR作成の全工程自動化）
capabilities: Automated bug investigation using log analysis and code search
Backend and frontend bug fix implementation with minimal changes
Automatic test case generation for bug reproduction
Server startup verification for fix confirmation
Architecture review integration for code quality
QA check and Pull Request creation workflow
author: Crearize
securitySummary: Documentation-only skill containing markdown prompts for bug-fixing workflows. No executable code, network calls, file access primitives, or external command execution. Static findings are false positives triggered by documentation text patterns. Approved for marketplace publication.
valueStatement: Bug fixing requires multiple steps across investigation, implementation, testing, and review. This skill automates the entire process from root cause analysis to PR creation, ensuring consistent quality and comprehensive test coverage.
userTitle: Fix bugs end-to-end with full workflow automation
limitations: Requires issue description and suspected files for accurate targeting
Cannot fix architectural design issues or fundamental design flaws
Manual intervention needed for environment-specific or deployment issues

useCases.title: Automated debugging workflow
useCases.description: Fix production bugs quickly with systematic investigation and comprehensive test coverage

useCases.title: Bug reproduction automation
useCases.description: Create reliable test cases that prevent bug regression in future releases

useCases.title: Standardized fix process
useCases.description: Ensure consistent bug fix quality across the team with automated reviews and checks

promptTemplates.title: Basic bug report
promptTemplates.prompt: /fix-bug bug_description="Login page shows error when user enters valid credentials" target="frontend"

promptTemplates.title: Backend API issue
promptTemplates.prompt: /fix-bug bug_description="User registration fails with 500 error when email contains special characters" target="backend"

promptTemplates.title: Complex full-stack bug
promptTemplates.prompt: /fix-bug bug_description="Order confirmation email not sent after successful payment" target="both" issue_number="123"

promptTemplates.title: Performance regression
promptTemplates.prompt: /fix-bug bug_description="Dashboard loads in 30 seconds instead of 3 seconds" suspected_files="backend/src/main/java/com/api/OrderRepository.java" target="backend"

bestPractices: Provide suspected files when you have hints about the problematic area to speed up investigation
Include issue numbers in bug descriptions to link fixes to tracking systems
Review the generated test cases to ensure they cover edge cases and boundary conditions
antiPatterns: Using this skill for feature development instead of bug fixes wastes workflow automation
Skipping the architecture review step may allow bugs to reach production
Modifying unrelated code during bug fixes introduces new bugs and breaks existing functionality

faq.question: What platforms does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code for bug fixing workflows.

faq.question: What is the maximum bug complexity this skill can handle?
faq.answer: The skill handles single-component bugs efficiently. Multi-component bugs work best when suspected files are specified.

faq.question: Does this skill integrate with CI/CD pipelines?
faq.answer: The skill integrates with qa-check and review-architecture skills, which can connect to your CI/CD validation steps.

faq.question: Does this skill access or store my codebase data?
faq.answer: The skill only reads files needed for investigation. No code or data is stored externally or transmitted anywhere.

faq.question: What if the skill cannot identify the bug cause?
faq.answer: The skill will report investigation limitations and suggest providing additional information or narrowing the suspected files.

faq.question: How is this skill different from manual debugging?
faq.answer: The skill ensures consistent quality through automated testing, review checkpoints, and comprehensive documentation of the fix.
